title: High Noon
description: A Buzzier Bees add-on that tweaks many aspects of Mooblooms and the Sunny effect.
body:
## Overview

While there's certainly more in store for Mooblooms on Team Abnormals's end, this add-on is a bit of a band-aid fix that makes mooblooms less of a danger to themselves, and more of a utility to players. This mod enables greater control over the AoE in which Mooblooms can grant the Sunny effect, as well as various tweaks related to said status effect.


<details>
<summary>Secret Advancement</summary>

They say there is much wisdom to be gained from the Sun herself...gaze upon her visage at a specific hour through a Spyglass and bear witness to incredible knowledge...?

</details>



## Config
### Sunny Behaviors
- Mooblooms have the option to be fed items in the `high_noon:sun_feed` tag in order to grant Sunny in a radius. This tag includes sunflowers (vanilla or from the mod [Spawn](https://modrinth.com/mod/spawn-mod)) by default. The duration for which this lasts is also configurable.
- Mobs in the `buzzier_bees:moobloom_hostiles` tag will only retaliate when burned by the Sunny effect, instead of attacking Mooblooms by default.
- Mobs dependent on an in-game "magic light value", such as Endermen (teleporting more frequently) and Spiders (neutral behavior) will behave as if in the sun when Sunny is active.
- Phantoms still attack players with the Sunny effect (although they still burn when afflicted by said effect).
- Bees afflicted by Sunny can behave as if it were daytime, 24/7.
- Mobs afflicted by Sunny passively emit buttercup particles to serve as an indicator.
### Effect Radius
- The radius for which Mooblooms grant Sunny (whether as a baby or as an adult, as well as whether the radius is dependent on being fed `sun_feed`) can be configured.
### Eternal Youth
- Items in the tags `high_noon:youth_extender`/`high_noon:youth_resumer` behave like 26.1's Golden Dandelions. This only applies to buttercups by default.
- During worldgen, Mooblooms spawn as babies with their aging paused by default.
- Players can configure whether using a youth extender/resumer plays an eating sound, as well as whether the stack size shrinks (using up the item).
### Compat
- Iguanas and Sunfish from [Spawn](https://modrinth.com/mod/spawn-mod) afflicted by Sunny can bask 24/7.
- Living entities standing on a sunstone block incur the Sunny effect.
- Sunflowers from Spawn (very slowly) follow nearby Mooblooms with an active Sunny radius.
- Eyeblossoms from [Vanilla Backport](http://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport) shut when nearby Mooblooms with an active Sunny radius.

---

**Requires [Buzzier Bees](https://modrinth.com/mod/buzzier-bees) and [Blueprint](https://modrinth.com/mod/blueprint).**

Note: this mod is *not* affiliated with the original Abnormals team. Any questions regarding this mod should be directed to my [issue tracker](https://github.com/davidjjung/highnoon/issues), not theirs. Feel free to direct any suggestions (compat or otherwise) towards the tracker as well. (Whether I'll do something about ambersol and the Umvuthana remains to be seen...)
